fields.description: Display name for this survivorship rule
fields.label: Rule Name

fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: default-source-priority, newest-value
fields.label: Rule Code

fields.description: Strategy for selecting the winning value when merging records
fields.label: Rule Type
fields.options:
Source Priority
Most Recent
Highest Confidence
Authoritative Source
Most Complete
Custom

fields.description: Enable or disable this survivorship rule
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: If checked, this rule is used as the default for Golden Record merges
fields.label: Is Default Rule

fields.description: Define which fields this rule applies to
fields.label: Applies To
fields.options:
All Fields
Specific Fields
Field Pattern
Field Groups

fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names (e.g., product_name, description, short_description)
fields.label: Specific Fields

fields.description: Regex pattern to match field names (e.g., ^attr_.* for attribute fields)
fields.label: Field Pattern

fields.description: Comma-separated list of attribute groups (e.g., Technical Specifications, Marketing Content)
fields.label: Field Groups

fields.description: Define the priority order for source systems. Lower rank = higher priority
fields.label: Source Priorities

fields.description: Minimum confidence level required for a value to be considered (0-100%)
fields.label: Minimum Confidence Threshold

fields.description: If checked, manually set confidence levels take precedence over source defaults
fields.label: Prefer Manual Confidence Override

fields.description: The source system whose values are always used (if available)
fields.label: Authoritative Source System

fields.description: If checked, use other sources when authoritative source has no value
fields.label: Allow Fallback

fields.description: Rule to apply when authoritative source has no value
fields.label: Fallback Rule Type
fields.options:
Source Priority
Most Recent
Highest Confidence

fields.description: Dotted path to custom Python method (e.g., frappe_pim.mdm.custom_rules.my_rule)
fields.label: Custom Method

fields.description: JSON parameters to pass to the custom method
fields.label: Custom Parameters

fields.description: How to break ties when multiple values have equal priority/confidence
fields.label: Tie-Breaker Rule
fields.options:
Most Recent
First Encountered
Longest Value
Shortest Value
Alphabetical

fields.description: If checked, empty/null values are always deprioritized
fields.label: Prefer Non-Empty Values

fields.description: If checked, trim leading/trailing whitespace when comparing values
fields.label: Trim Whitespace

fields.description: Detailed description of when and how to use this survivorship rule
fields.label: Description

fields.description: Number of times this rule has been applied in Golden Record merges
fields.label: Times Applied

fields.description: When this rule was last used in a merge operation
fields.label: Last Applied At

fields.description: Total number of fields this rule has determined values for
fields.label: Fields Affected

fields.description: Average number of candidate values per field in merges
fields.label: Average Candidates
